title: Smallest doc-pack; paired .md + .rs/.ts draft patches
public_claim: Red Team Phase II handoff is a compact patch packet with paired documentation and source drafts.
distinctive_mechanism: It connects RedTeamLabRoom.tsx drafts with Intake, Sources, Scope, Assumptions, and Sessions surfaces, preserving both implementation notes and the room-state categories they are meant to instantiate.
use_value: It matters because it keeps the user-interface work tied to the reasoning categories that make red-team review auditable.
